leadText: A Chople Berry (Japanese: ヨプのみ Yop Fruit) is a type of Berry introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Held item 1.2 Ingredient 1.3 Exchange 1.3.1 Pokémon Dream World Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] If the holder is hit by a supereffective Fighting-type attack, it will consume its held Chople Berry and halve the attack's damage. If the holder has Ripen , the damage is multiplied by 1/4. Ingredient [ edit | edit source ] Berry Blending OR AS Chople Berries are red Berries that have a medium chance of producing a Pokéblock +. Poffin Cooking D P Pt BD SP When used alone, Chople Berries will produce Poffins with Spiciness 13, Bitterness 8 and smoothness 29 when cooked in 1 minute with no spills or burns. Ice Cream Scoop DW Flavor 1 Flavor 2 Flavor 3 Easy to scoop Stickiness Juice Shoppe X Y Chople Berries are red Berries in Group 2. Composting X Y Chople Berries are red Berries. Dye Houses S M US UM 30 Chople Berries, Charti Berries , and Shuca Berries are used to dye any white or dyed clothing into dark orange. Curry Sw Sh Chople Berries have a rarity of 5. Cram-o-matic Sw Sh Chople Berries are Fighting-type items and give 4 points towards the output value. Exchange [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Dream World [ edit | edit source ] In the Pokémon Dream World , the player could exchange Berries for Décor . The following Décor required Chople Berries. Catalogue Décor Price Pokémon Doll Catalogue Buneary Doll 15 Chople Berries

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods D P Pt Transfer from My Pokémon Ranch (held by Hayley's Buneary ) Pastoria City Battle Frontier (Scratch-Off Cards) Held by wild Buneary (5% chance) Ranch Hayley's trades (held by Buneary ) HG SS Bought by player's Mom Battle Frontier (Scratch-Off Cards) Held by wild Buneary (5% chance) PW White Lake B W Trade B2 W2 Join Avenue ( Flower Shop ) DW * First completion of the tutorial (player will be given five of one of the damage-reducing Berries from Fennel ) X Y Pokémon Village Inverse House Red Berry trees OR AS Route 123 Inverse Battle Stop Master Rank Pokémon Contest Spectacular (given by fan) PMC * Poké Doll Grabber (Lv. 1) S M US UM Held by Totem Gumshoos US / Raticate UM (during post-game rematch ) Berry piles ( Poni Wilds ) Sw Sh Berry trees ( Route 9 , Bridge Field ) Sw Sh IA Berry trees ( Fields of Honor ) Sw Sh CT Berry trees ( Ballimere Lake , Dyna Tree Hill ) BD SP Pastoria City Picked up by walking Pokémon (Hardy, Brave, Adamant, Naughty, Bold, Impish, Hasty, Sassy, Quirky Natures ) S V Sparkling overworld item ( North Province (Area One) ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period Sw Sh Pokémon Center Curry Ingredients and Berries Japan November 15, 2019 to October 31, 2021 As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period B W Video Game Championships 2012 Larvitar English Various B W B2 W2 Pokémon Adventure Camp Fossil Kabuto Japanese July 21, 2012 to September 30, 2013

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Poffin ingredient. If held by a Pokémon, it weakens a foe's supereffective Fighting-type attack. HG SS If held by a Pokémon, it weakens a foe's supereffective Fighting-type attack. B W B2 W2 Weakens a supereffective Fighting-type attack against the holding Pokémon. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA If held by a Pokémon, this Berry will lessen the damage taken from one supereffective Fighting-type attack. S V If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fighting-type move, the power of that move will be weakened. Tag information [ edit | edit source ] No. 41 Size: 3.0" (7.7 cm) Firmness: Soft Games Description D P Pt BD SP This Berry contains a substance that generates heat. It can even heat up a chilly heart. Curry information [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh A Berry with a substance that generates heat in its flesh. It's invaluable in cold areas.

A growing Chople plant's soil dries by 6% every hour, fully drying out in 17 hours. Generation V Planted 0 hours Sprouted 27 hours Taller 54 hours Flowering 81 hours Berries 108 hours A Chople plant will yield ? Berries. Generation VI Pokémon X and Y Planted 0 hours Sprouted 8 hours Growing 16 hours Bigger 24 hours Budding 32 hours Bloom 40 hours Berries 48 hours A Chople plant will yield 3-20 Berries. During its growth, watering the plant adds 1 Berries to the final harvest, weeding it adds 0.5, and removing a pest adds 2. Chople plants attract Ledyba as pests. Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Planted 0 hours Sprouted 8 hours Taller 16 hours Flowering 24 hours Berries 32 hours A Chople plant will yield 2-10 Berries. Generation VII Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon Planted 0 hours Sprouted 30 hours Taller 36 hours Flowering 44 hours Berries 48 hours A Chople plant will yield 2 Berries if Isle Aplenny is at Phase 1, 4 Berries if it is at Phase 2, and 6 Berries if it is at Phase 3. Generation VIII Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Planted 0 hours Sprouted 18 hours Taller 36 hours Flowering 54 hours Berries 72 hours A Chople plant will yield 2-5 Berries.
